items.title: Bayesian updating pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  prior["Prior P(theta)"] --> mult["x Likelihood P(x|theta)"]
  mult --> unnorm["Unnormalized posterior"]
  unnorm --> norm["Divide by P(x)"]
  norm --> post["Posterior P(theta|x)"]
items.caption: The posterior is built by multiplying prior and likelihood, then normalizing by the evidence P(x).

items.title: Prior vs posterior on the same parameter
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  data["Observed data x"] --> like["Likelihood over theta"]
  prior["Prior over theta"] --> blend["Posterior combines both"]
  like --> blend
  blend --> plot["Posterior density shifted toward data but pulled toward prior"]
items.caption: Geometrically, the posterior sits between what the prior preferred and what the likelihood rewards.
